headline: Smurfit Westrock (SW) Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Anthony P. J. Smurfit: Thank you very much, Ciaran, for the introduction.  Today, I'm joined by Ken Bowles, our Executive Vice President and Group CFO, and we appreciate all of you taking the time to be with us.  The quarter was characterized by some challenging months, specifically July in our North American region and August in Europe.

headline: Smurfit Westrock (SW) Q1 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: This is something the team is working on day in and day out to ensure that Smurfit Westrock continues with the objective of becoming the highest performing company in our sector.  In Latin America, we remain focused on expansion, where we see an opportunity, especially in our Brazilian market, to grow rapidly with new facilities in different parts of the country.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Smurfit WestRock, Lowers Price Target to $51
summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Smurfit WestRock (NYSE:SW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $53 to $51.

raw.headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Smurfit WestRock, Lowers Price Target to $51
raw.summary: Citigroup  analyst Anthony Pettinari   maintains Smurfit WestRock (NYSE:SW) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $53 to $51.

headline: Producers launch second wave of containerboard price increases in 2026
summary: International Paper is among several competitors that have joined the June price hike wave that Smurfit Westrock initiated. This comes as executives report rising input costs and demand improvements.

headline: Smurfit Westrock plc Results of Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and Filing of Form 8-K Reporting the Same
summary: DUBLIN - Smurfit Westrock plc today filed a Form 8-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission which notes that the Company held its 2026 annual general meeting of shareholders earlier...
